basicDetails.schemeName: Haryana Provision of Sports Equipment Scheme

schemeSubCategory.value: Sales of goods, services & data protection
schemeSubCategory.label: Sales of goods, services & data protection

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: "Haryana Provision of Sports Equipment Scheme" by the Sports Department, Government of Haryana provides sports equipment to Gram Panchayats and Municipal bodies to encourage youngsters in the state towards sports such as Volleyball, Football, Basketball, Handball, Boxing, Wrestling, Judo, Cricket. To receive the benefits, proper Field of Play (FoP) for the requisite sport should be available in the town/ village.
schemeContent.benefits_md: **Name of the Sport** **Eligible Equipment**VolleyballUp to 06 Balls and Net (if poles are installed)FootballUp to 06 Balls and Net (if poles are installed)BasketballUp to 06 Balls (if poles are installed)Handball Up to 06 Balls and Net (if poles are installed) BoxingUp to 06 Punching Bags and 12 pairs of gloves.WrestlingMats size length 1 meter x width 2 meters &amp;amp; thickness 5 cm. (18-piece Mats) with cover.JudoMats size length 1 meter x width 2 meters &amp;amp; thickness 5 cm. (18-piece Mats) with cover.CricketOne kit includes 02 bats, 02 sets of wickets with stumps, 06 balls, two pairs of batting pads and gloves and one pair of wicket-keeping pads and gloves.
schemeContent.briefDescription: "Haryana Provision of Sports Equipment Scheme" by the Sports Dept, Government of Haryana provides sports equipment to Gram Panchayats and Municipal bodies to encourage youngsters in the state towards sports such as Volleyball, Football, Basketball, Handball, Boxing, Wrestling, Judo, Cricket, etc.

children.text: "Haryana Provision of Sports Equipment Scheme" by the Sports Department, Government of Haryana provides sports equipment to Gram Panchayats and Municipal bodies to encourage youngsters in the state towards sports such as Volleyball, Football, Basketball, Handball, Boxing, Wrestling, Judo, Cricket. To receive the benefits, proper Field of Play (FoP) for the requisite sport should be available in the town/ village.
Up to 06 Balls and Net (if poles are installed)
Up to 06 Balls and Net (if poles are installed)
Up to 06 Balls (if poles are installed)
Up to 06 Balls and Net (if poles are installed)
Up to 06 Punching Bags and 12 pairs of gloves.
Mats size length 1 meter x width 2 meters & thickness 5 cm. (18-piece Mats) with cover.
Mats size length 1 meter x width 2 meters & thickness 5 cm. (18-piece Mats) with cover.
One kit includes 02 bats, 02 sets of wickets with stumps, 06 balls, two pairs of batting pads and gloves and one pair of wicket-keeping pads and gloves.
The interested applicant should take print of the

In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste the latest photographs of the Field of Play, mention the date & location on the photograph, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents.
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the District Sports Officer.

Request a receipt or acknowledgement District Sports Officer. Ensure that the receipt contains essential details such as the date and time of submission, and a unique identification number (if applicable).
In the case of Municipal Body application will be submitted by the concerned ward member/counsellor.
In the case of Gram Panchayat, the Sarpanch of the village may apply. In case of a vacancy for the post of Sarpanch, Gram Sachiv may apply.

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 1:** The interested applicant should take print of the [prescribed format ](https://cdnbbsr.s3waas.gov.in/s3e069ea4c9c233d36ff9c7f329bc08ff1/uploads/2023/09/20230919191172889.pdf)of the application form. **Step 2:** In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste the latest photographs of the Field of Play, mention the date & location on the photograph, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents. **Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the District Sports Officer. **Step 4:** Request a receipt or acknowledgement District Sports Officer. Ensure that the receipt contains essential details such as the date and time of submission, and a unique identification number (if applicable).
**NOTE 1:** In the case of Municipal Body application will be submitted by the concerned ward member/counsellor. **NOTE 2:** In the case of Gram Panchayat, the Sarpanch of the village may apply. In case of a vacancy for the post of Sarpanch, Gram Sachiv may apply.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should be a Municipal Body/Gram Panchayat of Haryana.
1. Field of Play (FOP) should be available in the town/village for the expected play.

children.text: The applicant should be a Municipal Body/Gram Panchayat of Haryana.
Field of Play (FOP) should be available in the town/village for the expected play.
